experience.title: Customer Support Associate
responsibilities: Assisted customers with product inquiries and issues.
Maintained customer service logs and reports.
Collaborated with team members to improve customer satisfaction.
achievements: Increased customer satisfaction ratings by 15% through effective communication.
Reduced response time to customer inquiries by 20%.

experience.title: Sales Associate
responsibilities: Engaged with customers to understand their needs and preferences.
Assisted in merchandising displays and store layout.
Processed transactions and managed cash register.
achievements: Achieved monthly sales targets 5 times during tenure.
Improved visual merchandising that resulted in a 10% sales increase during promotions.
